zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de La Haye於1188年出生在英國坎布利其爾坎布利其時，她的父親Geoffrey de la Haye43歲，母親Mrs Margaret De La Haye30歲。她於1202年與Geoffrey de Glanville在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。她去世於1208年在英國享年20歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de La Haye于1188年出生在英国坎布利其爾坎布利其时，她的父亲Geoffrey de la Haye43岁，母亲Mrs Margaret De La Haye30岁。她于1202年与Geoffrey de Glanville在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。她去世于1208年在英国享年20岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Haye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Helmut, Willi.

North German, East Frisian, and Dutch: from a personal name, Frisian Hajo, ancient Germanic Haio; or from a short form of the female name Hadewig, composed of the elements hadu ‘battle, strife’ + wīg ‘war’.
German: variant of   Hey   4, 5.

variants.name: Deshayes
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived by an enclosure, from the plural of Old French haye ‘hedge’ (see Haye and Hayes ), with fused preposition and definite article des ‘from the’; or a habitational name denoting someone from Les Hayes, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Deshaies .

variants.name: Hayenga
meanings: East Frisian: patronymic from the personal name Hajo (see Haye 1). It is formed with the suffix -enga, a variant of -inga (from the patronymic suffix -ing and genitive plural ending -a).

variants.name: Hey
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Hay  .
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized (or archaic) and Flemish, of Heij, a topographic name for someone who lived on a heath, Dutch hei, heide.
German: metonymic occupational name for a grower or mower of grass, from Middle High German höu ‘grass, hay’.

variants.name: Hayen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse.  German Heinz, Wilhelm.
Flemish, East Frisian, and North German: patronymic from   Haye   1.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de La Haye was born in 1188, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, her father, Geoffrey de la Haye, was 43 and her mother, Mrs Margaret De La Haye, was 30. She married Geoffrey de Glanville in 1202, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. She died in 1208, in England, at the age of 20.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de La Haye est née en 1188, à Canteburge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey de la Haye, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Mrs Margaret De La Haye, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffrey de Glanville en 1202, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1208, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 20 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de La Haye 1188 in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffrey de la Haye 43 und ihre Mutter Mrs Margaret De La Haye 30. Sie hat 1202 in England, United Kingdom Geoffrey de Glanville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1208 im Alter von 20 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de La Haye è nata il nel 1188 nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, sua padre, Geoffrey de la Haye, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Mrs Margaret De La Haye, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Geoffrey de Glanville nel 1202, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie. Morì nel 1208, nel England, all'età di 20 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de La Hayeが1188年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de la Hayeは43歳，母Mrs Margaret De La Hayeは30歳であった。1202年にイギリスイギリスでGeoffrey de Glanvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1208年にイギリスで20歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de La Haye(이)가 1188년 영국 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey de la Haye(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Margaret De La Haye(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1202년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Geoffrey de Glanville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1208년 영국에서 20세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de La Haye nasceu em 1188, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffrey de la Haye, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Margaret De La Haye, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffrey de Glanville em 1202, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1208, em Inglaterra, com 20 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de La Haye родилась в 1188 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Geoffrey de la Haye было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Margaret De La Haye, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey de Glanville в 1202 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1208 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 20 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de La Haye nació en 1188, en Cantebriche, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Geoffrey de la Haye, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Mrs Margaret De La Haye, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Geoffrey de Glanville en 1202, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijas. Murió en 1208, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 20 años.
